description: dbt MCP — manifest/run_results/sources/catalog parsing + DQ result tables (BigQuery/Postgres)
name: io.github.us-all/dbt

environmentVariables.description: Path to dbt project root (where dbt_project.yml lives).
environmentVariables.name: DBT_PROJECT_DIR

environmentVariables.description: dbt target dir for manifest.json/run_results.json (default: $DBT_PROJECT_DIR/target).
environmentVariables.name: DBT_TARGET_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Optional dir for archived run_results.json history (glob-scanned).
environmentVariables.name: DBT_RUN_HISTORY_DIR

environmentVariables.description: DQ result table backend: 'bigquery' (default) or 'postgres'.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_BACKEND

environmentVariables.description: Fully qualified DQ checks table, e.g. 'project.data_ops.quality_checks'.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_RESULTS_TABLE

environmentVariables.description: Fully qualified DQ score-daily table, e.g. 'project.data_ops.quality_score_daily'.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_SCORE_TABLE

environmentVariables.description: Service account key path for BigQuery (ADC fallback supported).
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS

environmentVariables.description: Explicit BigQuery project ID for DQ queries.
environmentVariables.name: BQ_PROJECT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Postgres connection string when DQ_BACKEND=postgres.
environmentVariables.name: PG_CONNECTION_STRING

environmentVariables.description: Reserved for future write tools. Default read-only.
environmentVariables.name: DBT_ALLOW_WRITE

environmentVariables.description: DQ result-table schema preset: 'generic' (default) or 'us-all'. Use DQ_COL_* env vars to override individual columns on top of the preset.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_SCHEMA

environmentVariables.description: Override for the timestamp/date column on the DQ checks table. Default depends on DQ_SCHEMA preset.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_RUN_AT

environmentVariables.description: Override for the check-type column on the DQ checks table. Default 'check_type'.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_CHECK_TYPE

environmentVariables.description: Override for the status column on the DQ checks table. Default 'status'.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_STATUS

environmentVariables.description: Override for the dataset/source column on the DQ checks table. Default depends on preset.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_DATASET

environmentVariables.description: Override for the table/target-name column on the DQ checks table. Default depends on preset.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_TABLE_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Override for the severity/dimension column on the DQ checks table. Default depends on preset.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_SEVERITY

environmentVariables.description: Override for the numeric failure-count column on the DQ checks table. Default depends on preset.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_FAILURE_COUNT

environmentVariables.description: Override for the message column on the DQ checks table. Default depends on preset.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_MESSAGE

environmentVariables.description: Override for the check_name column on the DQ checks table. Set to 'none'/'null'/'-' to synthesize check_name from check_type and table_name.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_CHECK_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Override for the date column on the DQ score-daily table. Default depends on preset.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_SCORE_DATE

environmentVariables.description: Override for the scope column on the DQ score-daily table. Set to 'none'/'null'/'-' if the table has no per-scope rollup.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_SCOPE

environmentVariables.description: Override for the tier column on the DQ score-daily table. Set to 'none'/'null'/'-' if the table has no tier dimension.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_COL_TIER

environmentVariables.description: When no tier column is configured (us-all preset or DQ_COL_TIER=none), the overall_score threshold dq-tier-status compares against (default 99.5). Superseded by DBT_SLA_CONFIG_PATH tier_sla.1 if both are set.
environmentVariables.name: DQ_TIER1_TARGET_PCT

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a YAML file that defines tier_sla (per-tier overall_score targets) and dbt_sla (test/freshness pass rates). When set, dq-tier-status and dq-tier-by-source read tier targets from this file, and dbt-sla-status compares run_results / sources pass rates against dbt_sla.test_pass_pct / freshness_pass_pct. Mtime cached.
environmentVariables.name: DBT_SLA_CONFIG_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated category allowlist (dbt,quality,meta).
environmentVariables.name: DBT_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated category disablelist.
environmentVariables.name: DBT_DISABLE
